heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1108 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this subchapter, but sums appropriated for any one fiscal year shall not exceed $1,200,000.
notes: Amendments1969— substituted “$1,200,000” for “$1,500,000”.Pub. L. 91–151966— substituted “this title” for “this Act”, which, for purposes of codification, has been changed to “this subchapter”.Pub. L. 89–688
amendments: Amendments1969— substituted “$1,200,000” for “$1,500,000”.Pub. L. 91–151966— substituted “this title” for “this Act”, which, for purposes of codification, has been changed to “this subchapter”.Pub. L. 89–688
